title: Outlaws of Red River
writer: Gerald Beaumont, Harold Shumate, Malcolm Stuart Boylan
actors: Tom Mix, Tony the Horse, Marjorie Daw
plot: As a boy, Tom Morley (Tom Mix), was forced to watch the killings of his foster parents and the abduction of his foster sister. When he reaches manhood he joins the Texas Rangers and becomes so good at tracking down outlaws that he...
